subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me aflame with the fire of Thy love, after having been imprisoned in the most desolate of Thy lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی مشتعلا بنار حبک بعد الذی کنت مسجونا فی اخرب بلادک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God
